title: palicourea crocochlamys
intro: Palicourea crocochlamys, also known as the yellow-flowered palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparation of Palicourea crocochlamys can be made into a decoction or infusion, which is often used to treat various ailments, although its efficacy and safety require further scientific validation.
